summary: Add Lead Modal UI fixes verified - ALL P0 issues RESOLVED. Modal header uses purple gradient, all labels have dark text (text-text-primary #1A1A2E), select dropdowns show readable options (text-text-primary bg-white), inputs have border-2, Project Title placeholder changed to 'Brand Photoshoot - June 2026'. Form submission works correctly.

Modal header displays purple gradient background (bg-gradient-brand class) - PASS
All form labels are readable with dark text (text-text-primary #1A1A2E) - PASS
Project Category label color: rgb(26, 26, 46) - PASS
Select dropdowns show readable text in dark color on white background - PASS
Project Category dropdown options have 'text-text-primary bg-white py-2' classes - PASS
Industry dropdown options readable: Photography, Videography, Graphic Design, Web Design, etc. - PASS
All text inputs have visible border-2 borders (2px) - PASS
Project Title placeholder says 'Brand Photoshoot - June 2026' (not Wedding) - PASS
Form validation works - shows 'Please fill in all required fields' error - PASS
Cancel button closes the modal - PASS
Close (X) button closes the modal - PASS
Project Type selector cards work (Service, Commission, Project, Product Sale) - PASS
Deliverable Type chips work (Digital Files, Physical Art, Prints, Service, Website, Mixed) - PASS
Commission Details section appears when Commission project type selected - PASS
Physical Deliverable Details section appears when Physical Art/Prints selected - PASS
Form submission works correctly with required fields filled - PASS
Success celebration modal ('First Project Created!') appears after submission - PASS
Modal closes after successful submission - PASS
Lead appears in kanban board with correct data after creation - PASS
